test.query: SELECT WatchID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY WatchID ORDER BY WatchID ASC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
SELECT UserID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY UserID ORDER BY UserID ASC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
SELECT UserID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY UserID ORDER BY UserID ASC LIMIT 1000 FORMAT Null
SELECT URL, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY URL ORDER BY URL ASC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
SELECT RegionID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY RegionID ORDER BY RegionID ASC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
SELECT number, count() FROM numbers_mt(50000000) GROUP BY number ORDER BY number ASC LIMIT 100 FORMAT Null
SELECT UserID, RegionID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY UserID, RegionID ORDER BY UserID, RegionID ASC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
SELECT UserID, RegionID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY UserID, RegionID ORDER BY UserID, RegionID ASC LIMIT 1000 FORMAT Null
SELECT UserID, RegionID, CounterID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY UserID, RegionID, CounterID ORDER BY UserID, RegionID, CounterID ASC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
SELECT RegionID, CounterID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY RegionID, CounterID ORDER BY RegionID, CounterID ASC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
SELECT UserID, RegionID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY UserID, RegionID ORDER BY UserID ASC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
SELECT UserID, RegionID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY UserID, RegionID ORDER BY UserID ASC LIMIT 1000 FORMAT Null
SELECT UserID, RegionID, CounterID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY UserID, RegionID, CounterID ORDER BY UserID ASC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
SELECT UserID, RegionID, CounterID, count() FROM hits_100m_single GROUP BY UserID, RegionID, CounterID ORDER BY UserID, RegionID ASC LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
